subject: Swift-BAT trigger 536502 is not astrophysical
body:
S.D. Barthelmy (GSFC), J.A. Kennea (PSU), and P. Romano (INAF-IASFPA)
on behalf of the Swift team report:

Using the data set from T-73 to T+963 sec from recent telemetry downlinks,
Swift-BAT trigger 536502 (GCN 13885) is not an astrophysical source.
It is a chance noise fluctuation in the image domain near the location
of SAX J1818.6-1703.
